title: ctenopteris brevivenosa
intro: Ctenopteris brevivenosa, also known as the short-veined fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and combat infections. The health benefits of Ctenopteris brevivenosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, lower blood pressure, and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, such as decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
